channel.title: Projects on jpacheco.xyz
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on jpacheco.xyz

item.title: Shell-utils
item.description: Overview Welcome to the Shell Utilities repository This project provides a collection of shell scripts tailored for different window managers and environments, including i3, Hyprland, and Sway, on X11 and Wayland. Repository Structure The repository is organized into directories based on the environment and window manager: . ├── wayland │ ├── hyprland │ └── sway └── x11 └── i3 wayland/hyprland Scripts for Hyprland on Wayland. wayland/sway Scripts for Sway on Wayland.

item.title: Void linux bootstrap.
item.description: This is the first post of the 2024, this is a project that I am working on in the last year, is a minimialist voidlinux instalator it is based in some recomendations in a guides that some friends of my have but “semiautomated”. VoidStrap installer. A basic minimalist installer of void-linux with some packages to get ready to enjoy this amazing GNU/Linux distribution. Usage: Running install.sh Download the iso, and once in root inside the live, git clone this repo: (You need to update inside the iso and install git)
